description: Create an 'Exoplanet Explorer' dashboard tiddler to filter a catalog of planets tagged 'Exoplanet'. The dashboard must include dropdown menus for 'Discovery Method' (Transit, Radial Velocity, Imaging) and 'Planet Type' (Gas Giant, Super Earth, Terrestrial), with selections stored in the 'discovery-method' and 'planet-type' fields of the '$:/state/ExoplanetFilter' state tiddler. The interface must dynamically display a list of links to all planets matching the current filter selections.
